name: spore-example-12-cordyceps
description: spore-core TypeScript example 12: cordyceps — the Composable Execution capstone (#117–#131). A declarative LoopStrategy tree Ralph[PlanExecute[ReAct, SelfVerifying[ReAct]]] is loaded VERBATIM from the canonical fixture, its string handles wired to collaborators in an ExecutionRegistry, and run end-to-end: plan→ready-set DAG, Default-FAIL self-verify, bounded runaway, resume-by-handle-reresolution, and the #114 consult ladder PRESERVED host-mediated (seam moved off SubagentTool). The `audit` skill rides the global SkillInjectingContextManager always-active.
